zh.Eaton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾伊頓 白 從萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Grosvenor於1445年出生在英國爾伊頓時，他的父親Robert Grosvenor12歲，母親Joan Fitton12歲。他於1477年與Katherine NORREYS結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年在英國英格蘭爾伊頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.Eaton, Cheshire, England: 英国爾伊頓 白 從萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Grosvenor于1445年出生在英国爾伊頓时，他的父亲Robert Grosvenor12岁，母亲Joan Fitton12岁。他于1477年与Katherine NORREYS结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年在英国英格兰爾伊頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Grosvenor was born in 1445, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Grosvenor, was 12 and his mother, Joan Fitton, was 12. He married Katherine NORREYS in 1477. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1497, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Grosvenor est né en 1445, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Grosvenor, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitton, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Katherine NORREYS en 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1497, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Grosvenor 1445 in Eaton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Grosvenor 12 und seine Mutter Joan Fitton 12. Er hat 1477 Katherine NORREYS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1497 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Grosvenor è nato il nel 1445 nel Eaton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Grosvenor, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Joan Fitton, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Katherine NORREYS nel 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1497, nel Eaton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Grosvenor(이)가 1445년 영국 체실르 이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Grosvenor(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fitton(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1477년 Katherine NORREYS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 이턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Grosvenor родился в 1445 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Grosvenor было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitton, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine NORREYS в 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1497 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
